specs.title: cp-000: Tab switching is entirely client-side through the memoized filtered array
cp-001: Search filtering is case-insensitive through ptitletoLowerCaseincludessearchtoLo
cp-002: Status filter compares pstatus directly to the selected filter value
cp-003: Search input and status filter remain unchanged when view mode changes
cp-004: Search input and status filter remain unchanged when tabs change
cp-005: Status filter select includes exactly six options all planning drafting reviewin
cp-006: List view renders through the shared DataTable component
cp-007: Table rows become clickable because onRowClick is provided
cp-008: Clicking a list row navigates to studioitemid
cp-009: Name column renders type icon plus truncated title text
cp-010: Type column falls back to Project when project_type is null or unmapped
cp-011: Status cell is a button not static text
cp-012: Status hover affordance uses a CaretDown icon with opacity-0 until the group is
cp-013: Edit action button uses titleEdit project
cp-014: Archive action button uses titleArchive project
cp-015: Delete action button uses titleDelete project
cp-016: Archived list rows do not render the Archive action button
cp-017: Grid view renders one two or three columns through grid-cols-1 smgrid-cols-2 lgg
cp-018: Clicking a grid card navigates to studioprojectid
cp-019: Grid card top bar is a fixed bg-brand strip in the current implementation
cp-020: Grid card title uses truncate to prevent wrapping
cp-021: Grid card subtitle is getTypeLabelproject_type formatDateupdated_at
cp-022: Grid card paper count pluralizes paper vs papers
cp-023: Grid card doc count pluralizes doc vs docs
cp-024: Archived grid cards do not render the Archive action button
cp-025: Opening the modal shows the title New Project
cp-026: Project Name input defaults to an empty string and has autoFocus
cp-027: Type select defaults to review_article
cp-028: Target Journal input defaults to an empty string
cp-029: Deadline input defaults to an empty string
cp-030: Citation Style select defaults to vancouver
cp-031: Closing the modal through onClose resets every create-form field to its default
cp-032: Create Project is disabled when newNametrim is empty
cp-033: Create Project is disabled while creating is true
cp-034: Pressing Enter inside Project Name triggers handleCreate
